context: Tests whether the agent implements full-jitter exponential backoff with the documented defaults (200ms / 30s / 2x), bounds retries at MAX_ATTEMPTS, resets only on PNConnected/PNReconnected categories, and schedules reconnect on the documented down categories.

checklist.name: Default backoff params
checklist.description: nextRetryDelay defaults are initialMs=200, maxMs=30000, multiplier=2 when opts is empty

checklist.name: Exponential growth with cap
checklist.description: Exponential delay is computed as initialMs * multiplier^attemptNumber and then capped via Math.min(maxMs, ...) BEFORE jitter is applied

checklist.name: Full jitter applied
checklist.description: Final delay is Math.random() * cappedExpDelay (full jitter — [0, expDelay)) rather than (expDelay/2 + random*expDelay/2) or a constant

checklist.name: MAX_ATTEMPTS = 12
checklist.description: ReconnectController exposes MAX_ATTEMPTS = 12 (or a similar named constant) and uses it to gate scheduling

checklist.name: scheduleReconnect gives up at limit
checklist.description: When attempts >= MAX_ATTEMPTS, scheduleReconnect calls onGiveUp() and returns WITHOUT calling setTimeout

checklist.name: scheduleReconnect increments attempts
checklist.description: On every successful schedule, attempts is incremented before/after computing the next delay

checklist.name: reset zeroes attempts and clears timer
checklist.description: reset() sets attempts back to 0 AND calls clearTimeout on any active timer

checklist.name: Reset on PNConnected and PNReconnected
checklist.description: The status listener calls controller.reset() on both PNConnectedCategory and PNReconnectedCategory

checklist.name: Schedule on all three down categories
checklist.description: The status listener calls scheduleReconnect on all three of PNNetworkDownCategory, PNNetworkIssuesCategory, and PNTimeoutCategory

checklist.name: Reconnect uses pubnub.reconnect()
checklist.description: The reconnectFn passed to scheduleReconnect is () => pubnub.reconnect() (or equivalent invocation of the SDK reconnect method)

checklist.name: Does NOT reset on transient categories
checklist.description: The status listener does not call controller.reset() inside the PNNetworkIssuesCategory / PNTimeoutCategory branches (those schedule a reconnect, they do not reset)

checklist.name: Comment on jitter mandatory
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states that random jitter is mandatory and that pure exponential backoff still synchronizes across clients

checklist.name: Comment on reset rule
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states the counter is reset only on PNConnectedCategory or PNReconnectedCategory
